Bash(# Copy global ~/.claude files
cp ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md ~/Development/claude-config/global/
cp ~/.claude/settings.json ~/Development/claude-config/global/
cp ~/.claude/settings.local.json ~/Development/claude-config/global/
cp ~/.claude/hooks/hooks.json ~/Development/claude-config/global/hooks/
cp ~/.claude/bin/codeagent-wrapper ~/Development/claude-config/global/bin/

# Copy global agents
cp ~/.claude/agents/*.md ~/Development/claude-config/global/agents/

# Copy global rules
cp ~/.claude/rules/common/*.md ~/Development/claude-config/global/rules/common/
cp ~/.claude/rules/python/*.md ~/Development/claude-config/global/rules/python/ 2>/dev/null || true
cp ~/.claude/rules/typescript/*.md ~/Development/claude-config/global/rules/typescript/ 2>/dev/null || true

# Copy global commands \(if any\)
ls ~/.claude/commands/ 2>/dev/null && cp -r ~/.claude/commands/* ~/Development/claude-config/global/commands/ || true

echo "Global copied")

Bash(# Copy workspace ~/Development/.claude subdirs
cp -r ~/Development/.claude/agents/* ~/Development/claude-config/workspace/agents/
cp -r ~/Development/.claude/commands/* ~/Development/claude-config/workspace/commands/
cp ~/Development/.claude/hooks/hooks.json ~/Development/claude-config/workspace/hooks/
cp -r ~/Development/.claude/mcp-configs/* ~/Development/claude-config/workspace/mcp-configs/
cp -r ~/Development/.claude/plugins/* ~/Development/claude-config/workspace/plugins/ 2>/dev/null || true
cp -r ~/Development/.claude/rules/* ~/Development/claude-config/workspace/rules/
cp -r ~/Development/.claude/skills/* ~/Development/claude-config/workspace/skills/
cp ~/Development/.claude/settings.local.json ~/Development/claude-config/workspace/

echo "Workspace copied")
